## 1. UI / Layout Tests

| TC-ID | Category | Test Case Name | Steps | Expected Result | Priority |
|-------|----------|----------------|-------|-----------------|----------|
| TN-UI-001 | UI | Tenant List page loads correctly | 1. Login as Platform Admin<br>2. Navigate to /platform-admin/tenant-management | Page loads with header "Tenant List", breadcrumb "Home > Tenant Management", table toolbar (Search, Filter, Columns, Add New, Import, Export) | High |
| TN-UI-002 | UI | New Tenant form sections display correctly | 1. Click "Add New" on Tenant List | Create form displays three main sections: Tenant Information, Legal Information, Tenant Owner, Technical Contact, Billing Information, and Default Setup Package | High |

## 2. Functional / CRUD Tests

| TC-ID | Category | Test Case Name | Steps | Expected Result | Priority |
|-------|----------|----------------|-------|-----------------|----------|
| TN-FN-001 | Functional | Create tenant successfully | 1. Open New Tenant form<br>2. Fill all required fields (Tenant Name, Subdomain, Subscription Plan, Company Name, Legal Type, Tax Code, Legal Address, Tenant Owner Name, Email)<br>3. Select Setup Packages<br>4. Click Save | Toast success appears, redirects to Tenant List, and the new tenant is stored. | Critical |
| TN-FN-002 | Functional | Search tenant by code or name | 1. Open Tenant List<br>2. Type the newly created tenant's name in Search input<br>3. Verify result | The table shows only the matching tenant row | High |
